title: Cool CRM workaround [sending mass-emails] :star_struck:

posts.cookedHtml:
Mass emails are not yet supported however…it can be done!

Sending mass emails can be done via…the email integration (not E&A)

Here’s a workaround video of how you can send mass emails.

We’d love to know if it was helpful
